bridge_bearer.description: Optional Bearer token; required if wechat-bridge was started with WECHAT_BRIDGE_BEARER set

self_wxid.description: Operator's own wxid. Required for @-mention gating in groups; without it, every group message will be treated as relevant.

require_mention_in_groups.description: When true, group messages are only forwarded to the agent when self_wxid appears in the message's mentionedIds list.
